forget password send code Enter your email address and we'll send you a 6-digit code to reset your password. Email address Email icon
enter code Code sent to %1$s verify code
enter new password new password confirm password update password
Verify Your Account To ensure your account is protected, we need to verify it's you Verification animation Step 1: Choose Verification Method Step 2: Enter Verification Code We'll send you a verification code to confirm your account Email Verification SMS Verification Send Code Enter the 6-digit code sent to: %1$s Enter 6-digit code Verification code icon Didn't receive the code? Resend Resend in %1$d seconds Verify Account Please select a verification method Please enter all 6 digits Invalid verification code Account verified successfully! Failed to send verification code A network error occurred 📱 SMS verification is coming soon! Please use Email verification for now. No email address is available Please enter the complete 6-digit code
Skip Next Get Started Track Your Baby's Growth Journey Monitor weight, height, and head circumference. Visualize your baby's development with beautiful growth charts and compare with WHO standards. Never Miss a Feeding or Sleep Time Log feedings, diaper changes, and sleep patterns. Get smart reminders and insights to establish healthy routines for your little one. Get Personalized Tips & Guidance Access expert advice on nutrition, sleep training, and development. Track milestones and celebrate every achievement together.
Select Language
Growth Tracking Select Child No child selected All Weight Height Head Circum. Legend: %1$s's weight High range (WHO 97th) Average (WHO 50th) Low range (WHO 3rd) LATEST MEASUREMENT: No measurement yet Tap "Add Measurement" to record your baby's first growth data. No baby selected Add a baby first to start tracking growth. View All Add Measurement MEASUREMENT HISTORY Percentiles: Weight Height Head Normal Above Avg Below Avg %1$s kg %1$s cm %1$s cm %1$d mo
Add Measurement Measurement Date Weight (kg) Height (cm) Head Circumference (cm) Save Measurement Saving… Cancel Edit Child Details Save Changes BIRTH MEASUREMENTS (Read-only)
All Measurements No measurements recorded yet. Delete
Baby Growth Track Baby Profile Growth Charts Health Records Hospital Bench Settings
Welcome Back! Track your baby's growth and milestones Welcome Add More Child You have 1 child You have %1$d children No babies added yet You don't have any baby yet.\nTap below to add your first one! Add Your First Baby SELECT CHILD Select a child… Next Vaccine Scheduled Useful Tools: Sleep Guide Feeding Guide Memory Add Baby IT'S A HANDSOME Baby Boy IT'S A BEAUTIFUL Baby Girl WELCOME TO Baby Growth Track

No archived children. No children match your search. Weight Height Male Female
Growth Track Monitor weight, height & development Milestones Track important milestones Health Records Medical appointments & vaccines Photo Gallery Precious memories Feeding Log Track feeding schedule Sleep Tracker Monitor sleep patterns
BASIC INFORMATION BIRTH MEASUREMENTS LATEST GROWTH RECORD VACCINATIONS MONTH PROGRESS Date of Birth Age Gender Days Old %1$d days Recorded on Completed Pending %1$d remaining 📅 %1$d days old Month %1$d progress %1$s cm %1$s kg %1$s cm (%2$dth %%ile) %1$s kg (%2$dth %%ile) Not recorded — Delete Child Delete Child Profile Are you sure you want to permanently delete This action cannot be undone. All growth records, vaccinations, and data for this child will be permanently deleted. Yes, Delete Cancel
Add New Children BASIC INFORMATION BIRTH MEASUREMENTS (Optional) Full Name * Date of Birth * Pick date Birth Weight Birth Height Head Circumference kg cm Gender * Male Female SELECT PHOTO Tap to add 📸 Photo upload — coming soon Save Child Saving… Uploading photo… Clear Form Dismiss Feature Coming Soon Baby photo upload will be available in a future update. Stay tuned — we're working on it! 🍼 Got it! OK Cancel Newborn

Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec

A vaccination schedule will be created automatically. Confirm Cancel Add a baby first to select this center
Health Records Vaccination schedule & health center ASSIGNED HEALTH CENTER No center assigned yet Tap to select a nearby health center Tap to change center Select Health Center SELECT CHILD
Vaccination Progress Overdue — Needs Attention Due Soon Upcoming Completed Dose %1$d %1$d mo +%1$dd adj. Add a baby first No Health Center Assigned Yet Select a health center for %1$s to auto-generate their vaccination schedule
Health Issues All Ongoing Resolved Add New Health Issue Mild Moderate Severe Resolved Mark Resolved
Appointments All Upcoming Past Cancelled Add New Appointments Cancel Upcoming
Reschedule Vaccinations This will regenerate the remaining vaccination schedule. Continue? Reschedule %1$d vaccination(s) overdue. Tap to reschedule. Schedule regenerated successfully. Home Baby Charts Health Settings

Settings Manage your account and preferences Save Send Code Verify Version %1$s Account Preferences Notifications Security About Account Actions Edit Profile Change Password We will send a 6-digit reset code to %1$s. Tap Send Code to continue. Enter Verification Code 6-digit code Set New Password New Password Confirm Password Passwords do not match Language App Theme Light Dark Baby Theme Color Girl 🎀 Boy 🚀 Neutral 🌟 Push Notifications Enable all app notifications Vaccination Reminders Remind before upcoming vaccines Growth Alerts Notify on growth milestones Appointment Reminders Remind before scheduled visits Health Alerts Notify on health issue updates Development Alerts Notify on development milestone updates Reminder Lead Time %1$d days before Save Password Auto-fill credentials on next login About App Privacy Policy Terms of Use Contact Support Baby Growth Tracker helps parents monitor their child's development with smart reminders and growth charts. Log Out Log Out You will be returned to the login screen. Your data will remain safe. Log Out Delete Account This action cannot be undone Delete Account This will permanently delete your account and all baby records. This cannot be undone. Delete Forever Name Phone Have a question or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you. support@babygrowth.com We typically respond within 24–48 hours. Baby Growth Tracker is committed to protecting your privacy.\n\n • We collect only the information needed to provide the app's features (baby profiles, growth records, vaccination schedules).\n • Your data is stored securely on our servers and is never sold to third parties.\n • You may delete your account at any time, which permanently removes all associated data.\n • We use industry-standard encryption for all data in transit and at rest.\n • Analytics data is anonymised and used only to improve the app.\n\n For questions, contact support@babygrowth.com. By using Baby Growth Tracker you agree to the following terms:\n\n 1. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter.\n 2. The app is intended as a tracking aid, not a medical diagnostic tool. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice.\n 3. You must not misuse the service or attempt to access data belonging to other users.\n 4. We reserve the right to update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.\n 5. The app is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.\n\n Last updated: 2025.
Completed Overdue Due Soon Upcoming Missed Rescheduled Completed: %1$s Scheduled: %1$s Age recommended Ideal date Scheduled date Adjustment Completed on Health Center Status Reschedule Remaining ⚠️ %1$d vaccination(s) overdue Tap to reschedule remaining vaccinations No vaccinations found
Information Family History Medical family background Information set Not set — tap to add Family History Save Edit Delete Family history saved successfully Family history deleted Delete Family History Are you sure you want to delete all family history information? This cannot be undone. Family History Not Set Please fill in the family medical history. This information helps track hereditary conditions for your baby's health. Add Information ✅ Information set ⚠️ Not filled yet Heredity Blood Diseases Heart & Vascular Diseases Metabolic Diseases Appendicitis Tuberculosis Parkinsonism Allergies Others Enter heredity information… Enter blood disease history… Enter heart and vascular disease history… Enter metabolic disease history… Enter appendicitis history… Enter tuberculosis history… Enter parkinsonism history… Enter allergy information… Enter other conditions…
Sleep Guide Help %1$s Sleep Better 💤 SELECT CHILD SELECT CATEGORY Sleep Strategies Sleep Needs Environment Lullabies All Bedtime Naps LULLABIES & SOUNDS 🎵 All Kurdish Arabic English NOW PLAYING: Play Pause Download Useful for %1$d Users Useful Useless Why it matters: Tips: Total Sleep: Night: Daytime: Total Nap Duration: %1$s %1$d months TIPS FOR THIS AGE No sleep guide available for this age.
Feeding Guide Help %1$s Eat Well 🍼 Milk Feeding Solid Foods Sample Schedule Foods to Avoid Feeding Tips All Breastfeeding Formula Feeding Combination Feeding FREQUENCY: DURATION: SIGNS OF HUNGER: SIGNS OF FULLNESS: TIP: Recommended Foods: Solid foods are not recommended for this age. No feeding guide available for this age.
Child Illnesses Add Illness Delete Illness Record Are you sure you want to delete this illness record? This action cannot be undone. Delete Child Illnesses %1$d active · %2$d total No illness records yet Add %1$d record(s) No records Add Illness No Illness Records Track your child's illnesses and medical history here. Add a record to get started. Add First Illness Active Resolved Diagnosed: %1$s Mark Resolved Mark Active Edit Delete Add Illness Edit Illness Illness Name * e.g. Flu, Chickenpox, Asthma Illness name is required Diagnosis Date YYYY-MM-DD Notes Additional notes, treatment, etc. Currently Active Save Update 🏥 ⚠️
Failed to load: %1$s Illness updated successfully Illness added successfully Save failed: %1$s Illness record deleted Delete failed: %1$s Update failed: %1$s Marked as resolved Marked as active
⚕️ No illness records — tap to add %1$d record(s) — all resolved
Record saved successfully An error occurred. Please try again. %1$d Month Locked — baby not yet this age Available when baby reaches %1$d month(s) ✅ Assessment recorded ⚠️ Not yet assessed Tap each item to mark as achieved ✓ or not ✗ Save Assessment Not started yet — tap to begin All %1$d months assessed ✅ %1$d / %2$d months assessed
👁️ Seeing + Moving Visual tracking & motor development milestones
Moves head and follows light with eyes Watches people and turns head to follow moving objects Tracks a flashlight beam across their field of vision
Turns head 180° to follow moving objects Attentively watches faces and tracks eye movements Carefully watches own hand movements Recognizes mother and smiles when they see her Hands open reflexively as if reaching for life
Eyes and head move freely in all directions when attention is caught Follows a person moving across the entire room Smiles and vocalises when seeing own reflection Reaches for a dropped object (shiny object) to pick it up Transfers an object from hand to hand to grab another
Watches objects and people with keen, close attention Picks up small objects using pincer grasp (thumb + index finger) Reaches toward desired objects Maintains attention on objects for 10–12 metres
Uses neat pincer grasp (thumbnail & large finger) to pick up objects Plays purposefully with toys Deliberately releases objects Recognises familiar people around them Tugs at others' clothing to get their attention
👂 Hearing + Talking Auditory responses & language development milestones
Startles at loud sounds; eyes fix and close; pays attention to faces Briefly turns toward a close sound (3–5 seconds) held 3–5 inches from ear Cries strongly when hungry or uncomfortable Prefers people's voices over other sounds
Calms to a loud sound; eyes widen and look around Calms and smiles when hearing mother's voice Turns head and eyes toward the source of a sound Coos, gurgles, or vocalises during milk feeding Stirs or reacts when a sound is made nearby
In a room, immediately turns to find where mother's voice is coming from Vocalises sounds or responds with syllables such as "da", "ta", etc. Smiles and moves tongue to imitate adult speech
Alert and happy; listens to everyday sounds Tries quietly and gradually to talk back and forth with caregivers Calls out or shouts to attract attention from people nearby Repeats sounds like "dada", "baba", etc. Responds to simple questions like "Where is daddy? / Where is the clock?"
Immediately turns around when hearing own name Says a few words with meaning Understands simple instructions like "Show me your eyes / head ..." Enjoys giving and taking objects when asked by adults
Seeing + Moving Hearing + Talking Child Development
Archive %1$s? This child will be moved to the archived list. You can restore them at any time using the Archived filter. 📦 Archive Restore %1$s? This child will be moved back to the active list. ♻️ Restore 6+ yrs
No vaccinations found Tap to reschedule all pending vaccinations Reschedule ⚠️ %1$d overdue 💉 %1$d to reschedule Rescheduling… Reschedule All Done Reschedule Complete ✅ Rescheduled (%1$d) ❌ Too Late — Marked as Missed (%1$d) ⏭️ Skipped (%1$d) These vaccinations are more than 2 months overdue. Please consult a doctor about whether they can still be given. Checking vaccination windows and finding next valid dates… Rescheduling… Completed Overdue Missed Due Soon Rescheduled Upcoming Completed: %1$s Scheduled: %1$s Why are you rescheduling? Notes (optional) e.g. baby was sick… Overdue vaccinations that are still within the safe window will be rescheduled. Those that are too late will be marked as Missed.
Age recommended Ideal date Scheduled date Adjustment +%1$d days (%2$s) Completed on Health Center Status
Log Health Issue ISSUE DATE TITLE DESCRIPTION (OPTIONAL) SEVERITY STATUS e.g. Fever, Rash, Cough… Title is required Describe symptoms, observations… Resolved Ongoing Tap to toggle Save Health Issue Saving… Mild Moderate Severe
Log Appointment APPOINTMENT TYPE DATE TIME (OPTIONAL) DOCTOR NAME (OPTIONAL) LOCATION (OPTIONAL) NOTES (OPTIONAL) Date is required HH:MM (e.g. 10:30) Dr. … Hospital / Clinic name Any additional notes… Save Appointment Saving… Checkup Vaccination Consultation Follow-up Emergency
All Ongoing Resolved All Upcoming Past Cancelled Completed Cancelled Missed Upcoming Canceled Severity: %1$s Resolved Add New Health Issue Add New Appointments Status: %1$s

Filter 👪 Parent Added 🏥 Team Added Child's Memories Add Memory Add New Child's Memories Add First Memory Save Memory Delete Memory Delete Memory? This will permanently delete this memory and all associated images from this device. Yes, Delete No Memories Yet Start capturing precious moments! Add your first memory. SELECT CHILD All Children Photos are saved on this device only. Changing or losing your device may cause photo loss. Some photos are missing — they may have been saved on a different device. Some photos unavailable on this device Add Photos Maximum 10 photos reached Photo not available No photos added AGE AT THIS MOMENT TITLE * e.g. First Smile, First Steps… DATE DESCRIPTION Describe this precious moment… PHOTOS memories

👶 %1$s
Baby Growth Tracker
Just now %1$dm ago %1$dh ago %1$dd ago
__________________________________________________________________________________- Phone number is required Iraqi phone starting with 0 must be 11 digits (e.g. 07501234567) Iraqi phone starting with 964 must be 13 digits (e.g. 9647501234567) Phone must start with 0 or 964 Not a recognised Iraqi operator (Zain: 078x, Asiacell: 077x, Korek: 075x) Enter a valid Iraqi mobile number (e.g. 07507669716 or 9647507669716) Please enter your full name Please enter your email Please enter a valid email address Please enter a password Password must be at least 6 characters Please confirm your password Passwords do not match
Scroll to show input field
✅ %1$d can reschedule • ❌ %2$d too late (past %3$dmo window)
%1$d vaccination(s) cannot be rescheduled These vaccinations are more than %1$d months overdue and cannot be automatically rescheduled. Please consult a doctor about whether they can still be administered. 💉 Upcoming vaccinations are unaffected and continue normally.
Was due: %1$s Past %1$dmo window — consult doctor
Was due Cannot Reschedule This vaccination is more than %1$d months past its ideal date. Please consult a doctor.

Newborn Pre-Check Early examination of the newborn
✅ Examination recorded ⚠️ Not filled yet — tap to add Newborn Pre-Check Early examination record
Recorded on %1$s
Save Edit Delete Add Information
Delete Pre-Check Record Are you sure you want to delete this examination record? This action cannot be undone.
Newborn Examination Not Recorded Please fill in the early examination results for the newborn. This information is important for tracking the baby's initial health status.
Examination Date Select examination date
EXAMINATION ITEMS
Jaundice (زەردوی) Shortness of Breath (هەناسە تووندی) Turning Blue (شێن بوونەوە) Marble Heart (مەرمەر دڵ) Inflammation of Liver (هەڵ ئاوسنی جگەر) Inflammation of Spleen (هەڵ ئاوسنی سپێل) Hernia (قۆرى) Hydrocele (ئاوتیزانی گون) Hip Joint Dislocation (لەجی چوونی جووگەی سمت) Muscles Normal (ماسوڵکەکان ئاسایین) Reactions Normal (کاردانەوەکان ئاسایین) Nucleus Normal (ناوک ئاسایییە) Genitals Normal (نەندامی زاوزێی ئاسایییە) Eye Normal (چاو ئاسایییە) Red Reflex (کاردانەوەی سور) Reaction to Sound (کاردانەوەی بۆ دەنگ)
Others Any additional notes…
Yes No Unknown

Personal Information Login Credentials
Full Name * e.g. Dr. Sara Ahmed work@example.com Phone Number e.g. 07501234567 City e.g. Mosul Address Street / area details Confirm Password * At least 6 characters Re-enter the password
This account will have the Vaccination Team role — they can view and update baby vaccination schedules and health records assigned to their bench.

Select a date Change Scheduled Done Remaining
Send Join Request Cancel Request Choose Another Health Center
Request Sent — Waiting for Approval Your request for %1$s to join %2$s has been sent. The vaccination team will review it shortly. You will be notified once the team reviews your request. Only one request can be active at a time.
Request Rejected Your request to join %1$s was not accepted. Reason from the health center:
Pending Accepted Rejected Cancelled
Send Join Request Send Request to This Center? Send a join request for %1$s to %2$s? The team will review and accept or reject it. Send Request
Join Requests 📋 No Requests Yet Parents will send requests to join your health center here. Pending Requests Request History
Accept Reject Note: %1$s Reject reason: %1$s
Reject Request You are about to reject the request from %1$s. Please provide a reason so the parent knows why. Enter reject reason (required)… Reject
Requests 📋
Originally due: %1$s Rescheduled to: %1$s If missed again after %1$s, this vaccination will be marked overdue again. Last chance to complete before overdue: %1$s
